title: Cart Driver Wages
description: Players must pay wages for their cart drivers each turn. This is an ongoing operational cost that scales with fleet size. Driver quality may affect route efficiency or reliability.
definition-of-done: Driver wage system with per-turn costs. Wages scale with number of drivers/caravans. Driver quality tiers with different wages. Unpaid wages cause driver departure.
testing-plan: Verify wage calculation per turn. Test scaling with fleet size. Verify quality tier pricing. Test consequences of non-payment.
todos: Build wage scaling with fleet size
